SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.jgemini.base

Class FileUtil

java.lang.Object
me.kevinboone.jgemini.base.FileUtil
public class FileUtil extends Object
A collection of utility methods for parsing filenames and guessing file contents.

    Description
    static void
    appendStringToFile(String filename, String string)

    byteArrayToFile(File file, byte[] b)

    canHandleContent(String urlStr, String mime)
     
    static String
    getDefaultExtension(String mimeType)
    Get a suitable filename extension from a MIME type.
    static String
    getEncodingFromMime(String mime)
    Extract an encoding name from a MIME type.
    static String
    guessMimeTypeFromFilename(String filename)
     
    static String
    humanBytes(long value)
    Returns a string representation of a byte count, e.g., "110 kB".
    static String
    lookupExtension(String mimeType)
    Get a suitable filename extension from a MIME type.
    static byte[]
    readBufferedInputStreamFully(BufferedInputStream bis)
    Reads fully from the stream to a byte array
    static byte[]
    urlToByteArray(URL url)
    Reads fully from the URL to a byte array.

    • getDefaultExtension

      public static String getDefaultExtension(String mimeType)
      Get a suitable filename extension from a MIME type. If there is no mapping, return a default.

    • getEncodingFromMime

      public static String getEncodingFromMime(String mime)
      Extract an encoding name from a MIME type. If there is none, return "UTF-8".

    • guessMimeTypeFromFilename

      public static String guessMimeTypeFromFilename(String filename)

    • humanBytes

      public static String humanBytes(long value)
      Returns a string representation of a byte count, e.g., "110 kB".

    • lookupExtension

      public static String lookupExtension(String mimeType)
      Get a suitable filename extension from a MIME type. If there is no mapping, return null

    • readBufferedInputStreamFully

      public static byte[] readBufferedInputStreamFully(BufferedInputStream bis) throws IOException
      Reads fully from the stream to a byte array
      Throws:
      IOException

    • urlToByteArray

      public static byte[] urlToByteArray(URL url) throws IOException
      Reads fully from the URL to a byte array.
      Throws:
      IOException
